name: How long do I have to file a complaint against a law firm for bad AI referral?
description: 2-3 years in NY/CA from discovery for malpractice; bar complaints unlimited.[3]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a complaint against a law firm for bad AI referral?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2-3 years in NY/CA from discovery for malpractice; bar complaints unlimited.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Typically 1-6 years depending on state; NY/CAL malpractice is 2.5-3 years from discovery. No specific AI referral statute, but general negligence timelines apply.[3] Factors: discovery rule (when you knew of AI error), written vs oral referral. In Chicago/Houston, similar 2-4 year limits. File bar complaint anytime for ethics, but sue civilly within limits. Check your state bar site.
